summary: Iter10 validates the main-mode admin lockdown after the loyalty/main split. RESULT: ALL 4 acceptance criteria PASS. (1) Main-mode guards verified for ALL 8 routes — /admin, /admin-reservations, /admin-cms, /admin-settings, /admin-stats, /admin-staff, /admin-ads, /kiosk — every one redirects to / and renders the 'Pizza Denfert / Pizzeria artisanale franco-italienne / LYON' hero (no admin chrome whatsoever in the rendered HTML body). (2) Customer flows intact: / shows hero, /menu shows 'LA CARTE / Pizzas / Margherita…', /reserve shows the date+time picker, /account (logged out) shows the FIDÉLITÉ CLIENT eyebrow + 'Carte fidélité VIP' title + phone/name inputs + 'Recevoir le code' + Google CTA, and the 4-tab bottom bar (Accueil/Menu/Réserver/Compte) is present on every screen. (3) Staff shield button is gone: zero matches for [data-testid='staff-access-btn'] across the logged-out auth view. (4) Backend smoke: 8/8 pytest cases pass against EXPO_BACKEND_URL — admin login (200, is_admin=true) + /api/admin/reservations + /api/admin/settings/capacity + /api/admin/ads/slides + /api/admin/ads/settings + /api/admin/dashboard + /api/admin/staff + public /api/ads/slides + /api/menu. Note: there is no /api/admin/menu route (CMS is Supabase-backed via /api/menu) — adjusted test accordingly. No backend regressions. The loyalty native variant (APP_VARIANT=loyalty APK / loyalty.pizzadenfert.fr) cannot be exercised from the preview URL by design — out of scope per request.

react_native_issues.issue: Pre-existing console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Already reported in iter7-9; non-blocking.
Pre-existing console warning: '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web'. Expected on web preview, non-blocking.

critical_code_review_comments: All 8 admin/kiosk route files now use the same top-level guard pattern: `if (!isLoyaltyApp()) return <Redirect href={'/' as any} />;` — clean and consistent (admin.tsx:25-27, admin-reservations.tsx:60-62, admin-cms/_layout.tsx:8-10, admin-settings.tsx:13-15, admin-stats.tsx:18-20, admin-staff.tsx:31-33, admin-ads.tsx:25-27, kiosk.tsx:21-23). Reduces drift risk.
src/appMode.ts is concise and correct — hostname check on web ('loyalty.pizzadenfert.fr' only), Constants.expoConfig.extra.variant for native. Defaults to 'main' which is the safe fallback.

account.tsx exposes LoyaltyStaffIcon (testID 'loyalty-staff-icon') only when isLoyaltyApp() && user signed in. The previous 'staff-access-btn' has been removed entirely from the logged-out auth view — confirmed by grep + DOM query. Spec satisfied.
admin.tsx remains ~670 LoC — still flagged from earlier iterations as candidate for split (login form + scanner + customer panel + REWARDS + history in one file). Non-blocking.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 12 navigation checks pass (8 redirects + 4 customer screens)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Main-mode admin lockdown is fully in place via src/appMode.ts isLoyaltyApp() + Redirect guards at the top of every admin*/kiosk route. Backend admin endpoints are unchanged and respond 200 with admin Bearer token. There is intentionally NO /api/admin/menu endpoint — CMS is Supabase-backed and served through /api/menu. Loyalty variant must be smoke-tested via EAS staff APK build (production-loyalty-apk) — not possible from the preview URL. For future loyalty-side testing, the only DOM marker exposed in loyalty mode is testID='loyalty-staff-icon' inside the authenticated /account header.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs in this iteration.
